description_long: This chair features a sturdy metal frame with a matte dark finish, supporting three horizontal wooden slats for the seat and three for the backrest. The wood appears to be treated for outdoor durability, with a warm brown color and visible grain texture. The armrests are integrated into the metal frame, providing both support and a modern aesthetic. The legs are angled slightly outward, enhancing stability and giving the chair a contemporary look. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for public spaces such as parks or sidewalks. The combination of materials and construction suggests it is built to withstand frequent use and varying weather conditions.
description: A robust outdoor chair with a dark metal frame, wooden slat seat and backrest, and integrated armrests. Its design is modern and durable, ideal for public urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three wooden seat slats, three wooden backrest slats, and the full width of the armrests.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the wooden slats, and the angular metal frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden slats and the two main supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle, similar to view 1, showing the armrest and seat construction from the other side.
